title: Pharmacy Aides
description: Record drugs delivered to the pharmacy, store incoming merchandise, and inform the supervisor of stock needs. May operate cash register and accept prescriptions for filling.

tasks.text: Greet customers and help them locate merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Accept prescriptions for filling, gathering and processing necessary information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate cash register to process cash or credit sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer telephone inquiries, referring callers to pharmacist when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive, store, and inventory pharmaceutical supplies or medications, check for out-of-date medications, and notify pharmacist when inventory levels are low.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unpack, sort, count, and label incoming merchandise, including items requiring special handling or refrigeration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Restock storage areas, replenishing items on shelves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and clean equipment, work areas, or shelves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare prescription labels by typing or operating a computer and printer.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compound, package, and label pharmaceutical products, under direction of pharmacist.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Process medical insurance claims, posting bill amounts and calculating copayments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform clerical tasks, such as filing, compiling and maintaining prescription records, or composing letters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, and record records of inventories, receipts, purchases, or deliveries, using a variety of computer screen formats.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Deliver medication to treatment areas, living units, residences, or clinics, using various means of transportation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
